# OpenMDAO insane: full root utility slice

Wrap the full `openmdao` package root while filtering down to `utils.file_utils`, then verify module-path helpers, HTML rendering, tempdir lookup, and real output-directory cleanup.

## Why This Case Exists

The top OpenMDAO rung should start from the broad package root and still retain a small but genuinely useful utility slice with real filesystem side effects.

## Case Shape

- ID: `openmdao_insane`
- Family: `openmdao`
- Difficulty: `insane`
- Tier: `local_full`
- Style: `package`
- Workflow Slice: `systems`
- Target Kind: `package`
- Upstream Target: `openmdao`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/challenge.toml`

## Ingestion Breadth

- Minimum generated tools: `6`
- Required generated tools: `utils_file_utils__clean_outputs`, `utils_file_utils__fname2mod_name`, `utils_file_utils__get_module_path`, `utils_file_utils__get_tempdir`, `utils_file_utils__is_python_file`, `utils_file_utils__text2html`

## Why This Stays A Challenge

This case keeps its ingestion recipe and workflow assertions in
`challenge.toml` instead of checking in companion `ingest.py` and
`use.py` scripts. That boundary is intentional: the challenge lane
should stay a compact problem statement rather than turning into a
worked answer key like the real-world example lane.

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=openmdao_insane
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only openmdao_insane
```

## Prepared Inputs

- Render `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/demo_pkg/__init__.py` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/__init__.py` before the workflow runs.
- Render `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/demo_pkg/core.py` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py` before the workflow runs.
- Render `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/case_out/.openmdao_out` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/case_out/.openmdao_out` before the workflow runs.
- Render `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/case_out/trace.txt` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/case_out/trace.txt` before the workflow runs.

## Fixtures

- `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/case_out/.openmdao_out`
- `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/case_out/trace.txt`
- `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/demo_pkg/__init__.py`
- `challenges/cases/openmdao_insane/fixtures/demo_pkg/core.py`

## Workflow

### 1. Confirm the rendered demo module is a Python file through the full root facade

Tool: `utils_file_utils__is_python_file`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "file_path": "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py"
}
```

Expectations: text contains ['true'].

### 2. Resolve the rendered demo module path through the full root facade

Tool: `utils_file_utils__get_module_path`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "fpath": "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py"
}
```

Expectations: text contains ['demo_pkg.core'].

### 3. Render a tiny HTML snippet through the full root facade

Tool: `utils_file_utils__text2html`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "text": "Root cleanup trace",
  "title": "OpenMDAO Root Demo"
}
```

Expectations: text contains ['<!DOCTYPE html>', '<html'].

### 4. Return the active temporary directory from the full root facade

Tool: `utils_file_utils__get_tempdir`

Expectations: text contains ['tmp'].

### 5. Remove the marked OpenMDAO output directory through the full root facade

Tool: `utils_file_utils__clean_outputs`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "dryrun": false,
  "obj": "{challenge_artifact_dir}",
  "prompt": false,
  "recurse": true
}
```

Expectations: files are missing ['{challenge_artifact_dir}/case_out'].

### 6. Derive the rendered module basename through the full root facade

Tool: `utils_file_utils__fname2mod_name`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "fname": "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py"
}
```

Expectations: text contains ['core'].

## What This Case Proves

- Package-root ingestion can be constrained to a deep OpenMDAO utility submodule without handwritten cleanup.
- The generated facade can execute several real utility workflows from the filtered root view.
- The challenge suite can verify a real cleanup side effect through the broadest OpenMDAO wrapper entry point.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: push the OpenMDAO family from the full package root down into file utilities.
# This top rung keeps the workflow deterministic while using the broadest wrapper entry point in the family.
id = "openmdao_insane"
title = "OpenMDAO insane: full root utility slice"
tier = "local_full"
style = "package"
slice = "systems"
family = "openmdao"
difficulty = "insane"

[example]
summary = "Wrap the full `openmdao` package root while filtering down to `utils.file_utils`, then verify module-path helpers, HTML rendering, tempdir lookup, and real output-directory cleanup."
motivation = "The top OpenMDAO rung should start from the broad package root and still retain a small but genuinely useful utility slice with real filesystem side effects."
proves = [
  "Package-root ingestion can be constrained to a deep OpenMDAO utility submodule without handwritten cleanup.",
  "The generated facade can execute several real utility workflows from the filtered root view.",
  "The challenge suite can verify a real cleanup side effect through the broadest OpenMDAO wrapper entry point.",
]

[target]
kind = "package"
value = "openmdao"

[probe]
imports = ["openmdao"]

[scaffold]
kind = "package"
include_submodules = true
module_include_patterns = ["^openmdao\\.utils\\.file_utils$"]
symbol_include_patterns = [
  "^clean_outputs$",
  "^fname2mod_name$",
  "^get_module_path$",
  "^get_tempdir$",
  "^is_python_file$",
  "^text2html$",
]
max_generated_tools = 12

[setup]
[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/demo_pkg/__init__.py"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/__init__.py"

[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/demo_pkg/core.py"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py"

[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/case_out/.openmdao_out"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/case_out/.openmdao_out"

[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/case_out/trace.txt"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/case_out/trace.txt"

[ingestion]
min_generated_tools = 6
required_tools = [
  "utils_file_utils__clean_outputs",
  "utils_file_utils__fname2mod_name",
  "utils_file_utils__get_module_path",
  "utils_file_utils__get_tempdir",
  "utils_file_utils__is_python_file",
  "utils_file_utils__text2html",
]

[workflow]
[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Confirm the rendered demo module is a Python file through the full root facade"
tool = "utils_file_utils__is_python_file"
arguments = { file_path = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py" }

[workflow.steps.expect]
text_contains = ["true"]

[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Resolve the rendered demo module path through the full root facade"
tool = "utils_file_utils__get_module_path"
arguments = { fpath = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py" }

[workflow.steps.expect]
text_contains = ["demo_pkg.core"]

[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Render a tiny HTML snippet through the full root facade"
tool = "utils_file_utils__text2html"
arguments = { text = "Root cleanup trace", title = "OpenMDAO Root Demo" }

[workflow.steps.expect]
text_contains = ["<!DOCTYPE html>", "<html"]

[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Return the active temporary directory from the full root facade"
tool = "utils_file_utils__get_tempdir"
arguments = {}

[workflow.steps.expect]
text_contains = ["tmp"]

[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Remove the marked OpenMDAO output directory through the full root facade"
tool = "utils_file_utils__clean_outputs"
arguments = { obj = "{challenge_artifact_dir}", recurse = true, prompt = false, dryrun = false }

[workflow.steps.expect]
files_missing = ["{challenge_artifact_dir}/case_out"]

[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Derive the rendered module basename through the full root facade"
tool = "utils_file_utils__fname2mod_name"
arguments = { fname = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/demo_pkg/core.py" }

[workflow.steps.expect]
text_contains = ["core"]
```
